---
title: "Introduction to Biomedical Science"
author: ["Dr. Jane Smith"]
publication: "Coursera, **BIOMED-101**, _10 weeks_ (2024)"
categories: 
  - courses
  - biomedical-science
url_source: "https://www.coursera.org/example"
journ: "Coursera"
issue: "BIOMED-101"
page: "10 weeks"
year: 2024
image: ""
pub_number: 1
doi: ""
---

Foundational biomedical science course covering core concepts across biology, physiology, and translational medicine.
